text: I feel as though I am entering a space of inquiry and experimentation. The glass walls and modern design evoke a sense of order and clarity, yet the glowing signs and high-contrast colors hint at creativity and innovation within. Standing before the R+D wall, I feel curious and open, as if I am invited not only to observe but also to question the relationship between human progress and technology. The artificial lighting and sleekness of the space make me feel suspended in a realm where possibility and contemplation intersect.
